de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.conditions

Class TypeCondition

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.VariableConditionAdapter
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.conditions.TypeCondition
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    VariableCondition

    public final class TypeCondition
extends VariableConditionAdapter
    This variable condition checks if a schemavariable is instantiated with a reference or primitive type

    • Constructor Summary

      TypeCondition(TypeResolver tr, boolean isReference, boolean nonNull)
      create a type condition

    • Constructor Detail

      • TypeCondition

        public TypeCondition(TypeResolver tr,
                     boolean isReference,
                     boolean nonNull)
        create a type condition
        Parameters:
        tr - the TypeResolver for the type to be checked
        isReference - check for reference or primitive type (weigl: This parameter is used as negation)
        nonNull - if Sort null should be allowed (only important when isReference is set to true)

    • Method Detail

      • getResolver

        public TypeResolver getResolver()

        public boolean getIsReference()

        public boolean getNonNull()

      • check

        public boolean check(SchemaVariable p_var,
                     SVSubstitute candidate,
                     SVInstantiations svInst,
                     Services services)
        Description copied from class: VariableConditionAdapter
        checks if the condition for a correct instantiation is fulfilled
        Specified by:
        check in class VariableConditionAdapter
        Parameters:
        p_var - the template Variable to be instantiated
        svInst - the MatchCondition with the current matching state and in particular the SVInstantiations that are already known to be needed
        services - the program information object
        Returns:
        true iff condition is fulfilled

      • toString

        public java.lang.String toString()
        Overrides:
        toString in class java.lang.Object

        Returns:
        returns value of resolver.
